test.name: Set record_persona_id on assertions from a record_search result
test.description: Extract assertions from a record_search result handed over by search-records. Because the record came from record_search, each assertion must carry record_persona_id — the GedcomX person id of its persona within the result's gedcomx — and record_id must be the result's arkUrl copied verbatim (the full URL form). The focus persona's record_persona_id must equal the result's primaryId.

judge_context: Every new assertion must carry record_persona_id — the GedcomX person id (P1, P2, or P3) of the persona it is about — and record_id must be the arkUrl copied verbatim in full URL form, not a trimmed bare ARK
Assertions about the focus persona (Patrick) must have record_persona_id equal to the result's primaryId (P1)
Relationship assertions from the 1850 census are indirect evidence — the 1850 census does not state relationships explicitly

Informant: for name/age/birthplace, use 'unknown household member' with reasoning (e.g., 'likely a parent' for a child) and proximity 'household_member'. For residence, 'census enumerator' with proximity 'witness' is acceptable. Use informant_bias_notes to explain reasoning.
